questions.question: List the five essential characteristics of cloud computing as defined by NIST.

Compare and contrast the Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS) and Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) models. Your answer should include the division of responsibilities between the user and the provider, a typical use case for each, and one example service for each model.
keyPoints: Definition of IaaS: provides virtualized computing resources.
Definition of PaaS: provides a development and deployment platform.
IaaS User Manages: OS, runtime, middleware, applications, data.
IaaS Provider Manages: hardware, virtualization, networking, storage.
PaaS User Manages: applications and data.
PaaS Provider Manages: runtime, OS, servers, networking, storage.
IaaS Use Case: Migrating legacy applications, full control needed.
IaaS Example: Amazon EC2 or Azure VMs.
PaaS Use Case: Developer productivity, building web apps quickly.
PaaS Example: Google App Engine or Heroku.
